name: KPI Grid
description: Responsive grid of metric cards showing key performance indicators. Each card displays a label, value, trend, and optional sparkline.

default.description: Responsive grid of metric cards showing key performance indicators. Each card displays a label, value, trend, and optional sparkline.

slots.cards: Array of Statistic instances with label, value, trend props
slots.header: Optional section title with _heading4 and filter controls

compact.description: Dense KPI cards in a single row for information-heavy dashboards. Smaller text, tighter spacing.

slots.cards: Array of compact Statistic instances with size sm, no sparkline

featured.description: Hero KPI layout with one large featured metric and smaller supporting cards. Use for overview pages where one metric dominates.

slots.featured: Large Statistic spanning 2 columns with sparkline chart
slots.supporting: 3 smaller Statistic cards filling remaining space

sparkline.description: KPI cards with inline sparkline charts showing trend data. Richer data display for analytics dashboards.

slots.cards: Array of Statistic instances each with an embedded Sparkline showing trend data
